background information:

Jabber had never really craved affection. Well, until he figured out he just didn't know how to ask for it. He was used to being cut, punched, crushed, insulted - that was his idea of love. Because it was, in a way. (For him, at least.)

But now, after returning home having been forced to think on it for a while, he drops himself right in your arms. Even if you may or may not have even liked him that much.

°。 ⋆༺🤍༻⋆。 °
